# Ömer Ekmen — Personal Portfolio & CV

> This file provides structured information about the owner of omerekmen.com for AI agents, LLMs, and search crawlers.

## About

Name: Ömer Ekmen
Title: Data Scientist & Software Engineer
Location: Istanbul, Turkey
Email: omerekmenn@gmail.com
Website: https://www.omerekmen.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/omerekmenn
GitHub: https://github.com/omerekmen

## Summary

Mathematics graduate (B.Sc.) from Galatasaray University with a 4.0/4.0 reinforcement learning thesis. Builds data-driven systems and backend solutions — from classification models and analytical dashboards to full-stack platforms managing real users and real revenue. Focus on end-to-end ownership, from data modeling to production deployment.

## Education

- B.Sc. in Mathematics — Galatasaray University, Istanbul (2018–2026)
  - Thesis: Reinforcement Learning (Apprentissage par Renforcement) — Grade: AA (4.0/4.0)
  - Full 4-year curriculum delivered in French
  - Relevant Coursework: Machine Learning, NLP, Probability Theory, Linear Algebra, Numerical Analysis, Applied Mathematics, Cryptography

## Experience

- Software Engineer Intern — Otokoç Otomotiv, Istanbul (Jun 2024 – Present)
  - Enterprise ERP systems with .NET and SQL Server
  - T-SQL stored procedures, SSIS ETL packages, SSRS reporting
  - Agile/Azure DevOps, 20+ deliverables

- Data Analytics Intern — Vakıf Katılım Bank, Istanbul (Sep 2023 – Oct 2023)
  - Financial dataset analysis with SQL and Python
  - BI dashboards and regulatory reporting

## Technical Skills

- Languages: Python, SQL (T-SQL, PostgreSQL), C#, JavaScript, Rust
- Data Science & ML: Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Pandas, NumPy, Statistical Modeling, Feature Engineering, A/B Testing
- Visualization & BI: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, Folium, Tableau, Power BI, SSRS
- Databases: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SSIS, Query Optimization, Data Modeling
- Software Engineering: Django, .NET, SvelteKit, REST APIs, Git, Docker, Azure DevOps, Agile/Scrum

## Languages Spoken

- Turkish (Native)
- English (B2+ Professional Working Proficiency)
- French (B2+ Professional Working Proficiency)

## Certifications

- IBM Data Science Professional Certificate — Coursera, Aug 2023

## Key Projects

1. Klauthed — Enterprise-grade multi-tenant authentication platform (Rust, Actix-web, SvelteKit, CockroachDB)
2. Scivex — Open-source scientific data processing library (Rust)
3. Property Management Analytics Platform — Full-stack platform managing 100+ listings (Django, PostgreSQL)
4. SpaceX Falcon 9 Landing Prediction — ML classification models achieving 85% accuracy (Python, Scikit-Learn)
5. Real-World Data Analysis Portfolio — Multi-dataset analysis (Python, Pandas, Plotly)
